title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As we conclude the workweek and head into the weekend, take a moment to review the key articles from this week, including those you've highlighted. The Energy Transition - Made in China , Suezmaxes seek alternate routes as European crude demand is limited , Volatility muted amid uncertain economic outlook , China's critical role in the global crude oil market , and more. Capesize Rates Reach mid-20,000s as Panamax market Hit 8-Year Lows - The sharp rally in Capesize spot rates has come to a halt , with the Atlantic market experiencing a marked downturn.
